author: lOrm
content:
Forensic verification — issue already resolved by commit e5526f1a ("fix(lint): resolve all 634 strict-clippy diagnostics", 2026-05-18).

## Site audit (all 5 cited locations)

The line numbers in the issue body are stale (pre-refactor). Each cited site was rewritten in e5526f1a:

| File | Cited line | Status |
|---|---|---|
| src/pipeline.rs:138 | unwrap_or(&serde_json::json!("")) → unwrap_or_else(|| &*EMPTY_STR) (static) |
| src/pipeline.rs:139 | unwrap_or(&serde_json::json!({})) → unwrap_or_else(|| &*EMPTY_OBJ) (static) |
| src/pipeline.rs:299 | unwrap_or(2u64.pow(attempt + 1)) → unwrap_or_else(|| 2u64.pow(attempt + 1)) |
| src/vdd/mod.rs:1040 | obsolete — vdd/mod.rs is now 46 lines (file split into submodules) |
| src/tui/app.rs:143 | bonus or(fn()) case — handler split refactored to string-literal-only unwrap_or |

## Clippy verification (clippy 1.95.0)

```
$ cargo clippy --lib --all-features -- -W clippy::or_fun_call 2>&1 | grep or_fun_call
(empty — zero violations)

$ cargo clippy --bins --all-features -- -W clippy::or_fun_call 2>&1 | grep or_fun_call
(empty — zero violations)

$ grep -rn -E '\.unwrap_or\([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_:]*\(' src/
(empty — zero unwrap_or(fn_call) patterns remain)

$ grep -rn -E '\.or\([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_:]*\(' src/
(empty — zero or(fn_call) patterns remain)
```

## Constraints satisfied

- NO new #[allow] attributes (commit e5526f1a body: "no source ignore tags")
- NO clippy.toml modifications
- NO #[ignore] tags
- cargo clippy --lib + --bins exit 0, clean for or_fun_call

## Pre-existing out-of-scope blocker

`cargo clippy --all-targets` fails to compile lib-test target due to missing `#[derive(Debug)]` on `session::audit::AuditLogger` (src/session/audit.rs:72). This is unrelated to or_fun_call — a separate post-#377 regression. Should be tracked as its own issue.

Closing #378 as already-fixed.
